sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see! When the left green box is stuck at the purple bar:
- RIGHT moves the RIGHT green box (from cols 39-41 to cols 42-44)
- LEFT moves the RIGHT green box left
So when the left box is stuck, both LEFT and RIGHT control the right box! This makes sense - the arrow keys control the "active" or "unblocked" green box.
Now the right green box is at cols 42-44, and the right charcoal box is at cols 44-48. The green box is almost at the charcoal box. Let me move it RIGHT more to get it inside/aligned with the charcoal box.
Right charcoal box: cols 44-48, rows 26-30
Right green box: cols 42-44, rows 30-32
The green box needs to move RIGHT by 2 more columns to be at cols 44-46, which would put it inside the charcoal box horizontally. But vertically, the green box is at rows 30-32 and the charcoal box is at rows 26-30. They overlap at row 30.
To get the green box fully inside the charcoal box, I'd need to move it UP by 2 rows as well. But I haven't tested UP/DOWN yet.
Let me first move the right green box RIGHT by 2 more to align horizontally with the charcoal box, then try UP to see if it moves vertically.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# RIGHT now controls the right box (left box is stuck)
# Right green box at cols 42-44, need to move to cols 44-46 to align with charcoal box
# Move RIGHT 2 more times
action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
